pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which expects this name, and export_result.sh which explicitly hardcodes EXPECTED_NAME='HPLC Analysis Run 3' to query the database.
Verified from setup_task.sh which dynamically creates this project via SQL injection ('INSERT INTO projects (name...) VALUES ('Drug Discovery Pipeline'...)').

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an experiment named 'HPLC Analysis Run 3' under the synthetically generated project 'Drug Discovery Pipeline'. Both names are confirmed by the setup and export scripts.
